tracks.meaning: to cause something to happen or activate a process or mechanism
a stimulus or event that causes an emotional or psychological reaction, especially in someone with trauma or anxiety
the lever or mechanism on a firearm that is pulled with the finger to fire a shot
a device or mechanism that initiates the detonation of an explosive or bomb
a database mechanism that automatically executes a specified action when a particular event occurs
a sensor or mechanism that activates a device or system in response to a specific condition
a statement or action that provokes a strong or hostile response from someone
a warning label indicating that content may cause distress to people with trauma or specific sensitivities
a factor or event that initiates the onset of a disease, symptom, or medical condition
a predetermined condition that activates a financial transaction, alert, or automatic action
